texto: Life isn’t about waiting for the storm to pass
autor: it’s about learning to dance in the rain. It’s about removing the fear in this area of your life so you can focus on what matters most.
explicacao: Citação de it’s about learning to dance in the rain. It’s about removing the fear in this area of your life so you can focus on what matters most. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life isn’t about waiting for the storm to pass” articula reflexao, elite-summaries, includes-analysis em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e includes-analysis.
